title: The Cheeky Panda Bamboo Paper Straws | 250 Black Coloured Paper Drinking Straws
features: Paper Drinking Straws – The Cheeky Panda paper straws are made from 100% sustainable FSC-approved bamboo.
Biodegradable Straws – Our paper drinking straws are completely plastic free, even our packaging is recyclable cardboard. Helping you reduce your carbon footprint with every sip!
Strong and Long Lasting Straws – Made from resilient bamboo paper, the natural properties of bamboo give our paper straws a naturally strong body. Keeping your straws solid for longer
Vegan Friendly – Our bamboo paper drinking straws are vegan friendly.
Multiple Colours – Choose from Red, Green, Blue, Black, White or even Multicoloured paper straws from our collection. Whatever your taste, The Cheeky Panda has the drinking straws for you.

specifications_table.Manufacturer contact: ‎Ground Floor, 10 Lower Thames St, London EC3R 6EN
